hypothesis: Because KDM2A is tightly coupled to PI3K/mTOR/SGK1-driven rRNA transcription, ribosome biogenesis and proliferation, its knockdown most likely dampens the highly proliferation/autocrine-amplified Th2 program more than the low-baseline Th1 program in a Th2-polarizing assay, rather than acting as a bona fide selective GATA3/IL4 regulator.
